title: Rona Pertemuan di Tepi Air
theme: Dua individu menemukan koneksi tak terduga di tengah rutinitas mereka, membuka pintu untuk kemungkinan manis yang baru melalui kebaikan kecil.

cover.prompt: A serene riverside jogging path at early morning, bathed in gentle, cool light. A solitary figure, depicted as a strong silhouette, moves rhythmically on the path, evoking contemplation and focus. In the distance, a softly lit, awakening city skyline provides a subtle backdrop. The composition hints at abstract architectural lines or minimalist design elements subtly integrated into the environment, symbolizing creative thought. Cinematic composition with a focus on the rule of thirds and subtle depth of field.
cover.style: Minimalist composition, strong silhouettes, gentle lighting

meta.plan_summary: An architect engrossed in design nearly collides with an illustrator sketching by the river. Their accidental meeting, triggered by a scattered sketchbook, leads to a brief, warm exchange, revealing a shared appreciation for detail and leaving both with a subtle sense of connection and optimism.
meta.target_emotion: warmth, curiosity, subtle optimism, peaceful connection
